OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Gets the assessment completed by the employee to file a workers' compensation claim and the content documents for the files that the employee has uploaded during the assessment.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: GetContentDocumentsForEmployeeFiles

omniProcessElements.name: FetchEmployeeAssessment
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSSocInsFetchEmployeeAssessment", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "ContextId", "inputParam" : "ContextId" } ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction2", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }
